payload.title: CLI: scope sync (pull/push against cloud relay)
payload.description: Add scope sync: pull events since the stored cursor, push the local log delta, print renumber notices, persist the new cursor. Honor --json. Reuse event-store.js + existing replay so a synced workspace is indistinguishable from a git-synced one. Safe no-op when already in sync (count+cursor match). (From SCP-123.)
